text: Aaj pati ne achanak kaha ki Sasu-ma aur Sasur-ji permanently shift ho rahe hain kyunki unhe lagta hai meri 'umar' ho gayi hai aur ab waaris ke bina ghar sunna hai. Main office aur ghar ke dual burden se pehle hi ghut rahi hoon, par main unhe palat kar jawab nahi de saki kyunki bade-buzurgo ke aage bolna hamare sanskar nahi hain. Parivaar ki 'izzat' bachane ke liye maine muskurakar haan keh diya taaki maike walon ki naak na kat jaye.

In-laws ne decide kiya hai ki wo yahi rahenge taaki mujh par child pressure bana sakein, kyunki samaj mein sab keh rahe hain ki main 'expired' hone wali hoon. Main apni suppressed ambition aur career growth ki bali dene ko taiyar hoon kyunki main parivaar mein kalesh nahi chahti. Sasural ki maryada banaye rakhne ke liye maine apne saare darr daba liye hain taaki pati aur in-laws ka samman bana rahe.

Jab Sasu-ma ne kaha ki meri badhti age ke karan ab wo yahi reh kar meri lifestyle aur kundali ke upay monitor karengi, toh mera dum ghutne laga. Par main virodh nahi kar sakti kyunki unhone mere rishta aur dowry ke waqt bahut kurbaniyan di thi aur ab mera farz hai unki har zidd maan-na. 'Log kya kahenge' ki bahu ne buzurgon ko thukra diya, is darr se main bas unki seva mein jut gayi hoon.

Pati ne bina mujhse pooche in-laws ka permanent shift fix kar diya kyunki 30+ hone ke baad unhe lagta hai ki mujhe ab career se zyada 'ghar basane' par dhyan dena chahiye. Main working woman hoon par ghar ki shanti bhang na ho, isliye maine apni saari complaints andar hi daba li hain. Maine unhe naraz karke apne sasural mein tamasha nahi banne dena, isliye main bas unki haan mein haan mila rahi hoon.

In-laws ke aane ke baad meri bachi-kuchi identity aur career gap ki chinta aur gehari ho gayi hai, par main unke aage zubaan nahi chala sakti. Wo kehte hain ki meri 'umar' nikal rahi hai aur ab mujhe sirf bhagwan aur parivaar ki seva karni chahiye, aur main unka sir jhukne nahi de sakti. Apne sapno ko kurban karke main bas ek aadarsh bahu banne ka farz nibha rahi hoon taaki khandaan ka naam kharab na ho.
